channel.title: Tool on Dani Polani
channel.description: Recent content in Tool on Dani Polani

item.title: Cards
item.description: Text card and carousel maker: paste a quote, thread, or draft, get export-ready PNGs with social presets (Instagram, LinkedIn, X), smart slide splits, and optional saved projects.

item.title: Bitext Align
item.description: Word-by-word translation visualizer—bilingual alignment, optional gloss, exports.

item.title: Tools
item.description: Online tools for language, translation, conlanging, productivity, social media and other online activities.
